relatedComponents.name: Time Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system. Appears earlier in the same reservation chat flow.

relatedComponents.name: Time Date Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system.

relatedComponents.name: Month Year Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system.

relatedComponents.name: Number Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system.

subComponentsNote: No dedicated sub-components. Self-contained composite of two drum columns and two static text labels.

anatomy.description: Outer surface. 375px wide, 212px tall. Background: --surface/neutral/default in DS Core. In Customer App context, renders on dark surface --bg-surface-default (#1d1d23). No border, no border-radius.
Horizontal stripe centred vertically, spanning the full width. 31px tall. Marks the active selection row for both drum columns simultaneously. Image asset in Figma.

Flex row containing all four child elements in order: 'from' label, from-age column, 'to' label, to-age column. Centred horizontally with a 4px right offset (left: calc(50% + 4px)). Gap: 27px between all elements.
Static text 'from'. Manrope Medium (weight 500), 14px (size/base), --text/placeholder, letter-spacing/normal. Vertically aligned to the selection centre. Not a drum column item.
Center-aligned drum column. Displays age integers. Positions 1–3 (above the selection) use opacity: 0 — start-of-range boundary masking. Positions 4–7 are visible.
Static text 'to'. Same style as 'from' label. Visually separates the two age columns.
Center-aligned drum column. Displays age integers. All 7 positions are populated and visible (mid-range behaviour).

variantsNote: No named variants. The DS Core component defines a single frame. The from-age column always shows start-of-range boundary masking; the to-age column always shows mid-range (all positions visible).

scrollDepthSystem.description: Identical to Time Picker, Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker. Each column shows 7 items. The selected item is always at position 4 (centre).

fromColumnBoundary.description: Positions 1–3 in the from-age column use opacity: 0 to mask the start-of-range boundary. Values are present in the DOM but invisible.

from.note: Medium weight — distinct from drum column items (Regular weight 400).

columnGroup.note: All four elements share the same 27px gap. Confirmed from Figma: left: calc(50% + 4px).

drumColumns.note: Identical to all other drum pickers. All items use Regular weight regardless of selection state.

labels.note: The 'from' and 'to' labels use Medium weight — distinct from drum column items.

popupContext.screen: Chat view — Blue Marlin Reservation (Ibiza Week · Jun 9th)
popupContext.chatContext: Step after time selection. User has confirmed arrival at 09:41 AM. Dojo AI asks: 'Awesome! What age range does your group have? 👥'
popupContext.triggerComponent: Dojo AI chat message — 'Select age range' select button
popupContext.confirmAction: "Confirm age range" primary button — applies the selection

usageContext: Placed inside a bottom-sheet popup when the user needs to specify a group age range.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App: 'Select age range' popup triggered by the Dojo AI chat assistant in a restaurant/venue reservation flow.
Appears after time selection in the same reservation conversation (node 427:8852).
TODO: Confirm whether Age Range Picker is used in other app contexts beyond the reservation chat flow.
notes: The scroll depth visual system is identical to Time Picker, Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker — all five must be updated together if the system changes.
The selection indicator is an image asset in Figma — implementation should use a CSS equivalent.
The from-age column uses opacity: 0 for start-of-range masking (positions 1–3). This is consistent with Time Picker's AM/PM column boundary approach.
The 'from' and 'to' labels use Manrope Medium (weight 500) — this differs from drum column items (Regular, weight 400).
The column group has a confirmed 4px right offset from centre. TODO: Verify whether intentional or a Figma artefact.
TODO: Confirm minimum and maximum age values for the available range.
TODO: Confirm whether an upper boundary condition exists for the to-age column.
TODO: Confirm age wrapping behaviour (if any).
TODO: Confirm range validation behaviour — what happens if from > to.
